← the Atlas

Analysis

index·evergreen·JUN 19, 2026

Investigations into how the system actually behaves — measurements, profiling, root-cause digs, and the conclusions they support.

The Analysis index gathers notes that investigate how the system behaves: a measurement, a profiling pass, a root-cause dig that isn’t yet a fix. The output is a conclusion you can act on, with the evidence attached. (A study held up against an alternative — what to adopt from another tool or paradigm, where we differ — is a Comparison, not an Analysis.)

This note is an index (moc: true): a note is filed here by listing analysis in its parents. The graph renders it large; the notes wired to it are its cluster, and its card on the Atlas lists them all.

Referenced by

  • Graph view + Maps of Content
  • Is Mobile Electricity?

  • LLM Workflow Autonomy — A Self-Improvement Loop
  • OpenCode v2 Perf — What Kolu Can Adapt
  • Performance — Where Kolu Can Get Faster
  • Preferences storm
  • Whole-codebase correctness review
